authorization_phrase: Authorize s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum P2 phase-2 plan only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.

c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C1_live_mode_refusal: Algo.Initialize raises if LiveMode detected; paper-only forever
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C2_engine_truth_run_id: deterministic run_id over (tier_spec_seal + plan_lock_seal + plan_doc_sha + phase_tag + algo_version + engine dates); engine-truth date cross-check at Initialize
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C3_safety_counters: set-membership safety counters; all-zero rollup; extended_hours_fill NOT_APPLICABLE (daily bars)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C4_boundary_alignment: US equity RTH session boundary; eod_cancel aligns to 16:00 ET; daily-bar trivial; monthly rebalance occurs on the scheduled trading day (R=21 bars)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C5_corporate_action_handling: CASH-EQUITY split_only: GOOGL 20:1 (2022-07-18) FRESH verified; AMZN 20:1 / WMT 3:1 / NVDA 4:1+10:1 / AAPL 4:1 carried; MRK Organon spin-off encoded by Tiingo as 1.048 splitFactor -> applied -> return-continuous, documented PASS; COST 2023 special dividend in dividend stream -> one-day drop informational; dividends NOT adjusted; DR9 PASSED all 24 by REUSE (d86e5d1); no fetch
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C6_inherited_constraints: 14-entry inherited_constraints_block carried verbatim from SEAL (K9 inviolate + K13 walk-forward binding + relative-momentum first-principles + L/S/M/R locked + DA3 equal-weight + split_only + 24-name universe + DR9-by-reuse + K9-per-fold primary kill-risk + ...)
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C7_verdict_closed_enum: verdict restricted to closed enum (READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST / INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / FAIL_SAFETY / REJECT_FAST / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD / OOS_NOT_ROBUST); forbidden-token blocklist. OOS_NOT_ROBUST is the K13 (P6.7) fail verdict
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts_instantia.C8_lifecycle_states: permanent attributes (DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE; PAUSED; BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; FRC NEVER_GRANTED; no_strategy_optimization; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; walk_forward_k13_binding_for_s17_plus; no_per_fold_refit; no_fold_scheme_search)

dr10_v2_binding: carried by-reference from SEAL/P1 (framework SEAL 78cd22e); not redefined at P2
framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (52a3b60); carried by-reference from SEAL/P1; not redefined at P2
inherited_constraints_block_C6_carried_v: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100 total; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase. K9-per-fold/OOS is THE PRIMARY kill-risk for this low-turnover rotation.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-reference 52a3b60): locked rule positive in >=3 of 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds + aggregate net>0 + K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Fold boundaries LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA22).
K9-per-fold/OOS shortfall under the LOCKED monthly cadence = TERMINAL BLOCK, NOT a tuning trigger; a different cadence/lookback/M is a SEPARATE fresh candidate_record_id.

RELATIVE-MOMENTUM-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): signal=126-21 trailing return (skip-month); select top-M=6 equal-weight; exit=loss of relative rank (no trailing/ATR stop). Hypothesis (winners continue) tested at P6 IS + P6.7 K13, never assumed.
Momentum params L=126 / S=21 / M=6 / R=21(monthly) first-principles JUSTIFIED (not tuned) and LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA6/DA8/DA10/DA11).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M sizing; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; cash-equity cost_drag clears strong margin.
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN.
24-name broad universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 by REUSE (sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (24 names ~8 sectors); NOT the candidate's risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal preserved verbatim; this candidate is FRESH cross-sectional momentum; clears T-FORBID-16..22; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; the 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.

next_phase_authorization_scope.commit_this_p2: Authorize commit s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum P2 phase-2 plan only.
next_phase_authorization_scope.primary_forward: Authorize s17-d1 broad-universe cross-sectional momentum P3 BUILD only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.

no_automatic_build_or_run: P3 BUILD requires separate operator authorization; P2 only DEFINES the BUILD scope; no code written/run at P2

build_creates: runner harness (main.py): CONFIG byte-equivalent to SEAL DA register; cross-sectional momentum primitives (trailing_return(L=126, skip S=21) total return per name; cross_sectional_rank over the 24-name universe at each rebalance; select_top_M (M=6); equal_weight_targets (1/M); rebalance_every_R (R=21 trading days); rotation_exit: a held name leaving the top-M is fully closed (one closed_trade), proceeds redeployed equal-weight); long-only, no shorting, no leverage, no pyramid; QC-compat shim
in_sample_driver.py: 24-CSV registry (reuse d86e5d1); IS window 2019-01-02..2023-12-29; run_in_sample() STUB raising P6_IS_NOT_AUTHORIZED

walk_forward_driver.py [NEW for K13]: the 5 DA22 pre-committed UNSEARCHED folds (warmup 0-159; F1 160-478; F2 479-797; F3 798-1116; F4 1117-1435; F5 1436-1758); run_walk_forward() STUB raising P6_7_K13_NOT_AUTHORIZED; re-runs the LOCKED rule per fold (NO per-fold refit); fold isolation (no cross-fold parameter state)
out_of_sample_driver.py: OOS window 2024-01-02..2025-12-30; run_out_of_sample() STUB raising P10_OOS_NOT_AUTHORIZED; OOS isolation (no IS constants/year tokens/run_in_sample/top-level vendor imports)

execution_guard.py: C1-C8 attestation; K8 drift check vs SEAL constants; assert_locked_strategy_params (momentum DA register L=126/S=21/M=6/R=21); assert_rotation_exit (DA12; no trailing/ATR stop); assert_equal_weight_sizing (DA3); assert_long_only (DA20); assert_split_only_convention; assert_universe_locked (24 names); assert_no_leverage_cap; assert_k13_fold_scheme_locked (DA22 exact boundaries); assert_no_per_fold_refit

tests/: synthetic smoke battery (no real-data run at BUILD); incl. trailing-return / cross-sectional-rank / top-M-select / equal-weight / rotation-exit + K13 fold-partition (exact DA22 boundaries) + no-per-fold-refit + guard tests
4 sealed build reports (runner / IS-driver / walk-forward-driver / OOS-driver)
build_does_NOT: execute any backtest / simulator / signal computation
fetch data (reuses 24 sealed DR9-passed CSVs d86e5d1)
read OOS rows in signal logic
refit/optimize any parameter or search the K13 fold scheme
place any order / connect broker / live
p3_build_scope_defined.first_principles_carried_into_build: BUILD must implement the cross-sectional momentum rule EXACTLY as locked (DA6/DA8/DA9/DA10/DA11/DA12): 126-21 trailing-return rank, top-6 equal-weight, monthly rebalance, relative-rank rotation exit (no trailing/ATR stop, no oscillator). The s14/s15 mean-reversion and s16 absolute-trend designs are structurally excluded.
p3_build_scope_defined.k13_carried_into_build: BUILD must implement the K13 walk-forward driver re-running the LOCKED rule across the 5 DA22 folds (VALIDATION, not optimization); NO per-fold refit; fold boundaries byte-equivalent to DA22; OOS_NOT_ROBUST verdict path wired but not executed at BUILD

rec1_equivalent_oos_k9_disclosure: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 (>=50/y) is AT RISK for a monthly top-6 rotation (~24-72 over 2y). If observed effective OOS trade count < 50/y, OOS K9 is unreachable -> the candidate is K9-BLOCKED (terminal), NOT rescued by cadence change. The chain shall NOT relax K9.
